title: Photorealistic Eye Level Medium Shot Two Women
sourceTitle: Photorealistic Eye Level Medium Shot Two Women
prompt:
A photorealistic, eye-level medium shot of two women, [NAME_1] on the left and [NAME_2] on the right. Sydney has dyed purple hair, while Madison has dyed wavy green hair. Both have glossy lips and are wearing thin metal tiaras adorned with gemstones and small sci-fi prop antennas. They are standing in an intimate embrace, with their arms wrapped around each other's waists, looking directly into the camera lens. They are dressed in tight, highly reflective full-body latex catsuits: [NAME_1] wears a pink suit with silver stripes, and [NAME_2] wears a teal suit with black stripes.
The setting is an isolated mountain landscape at night, featuring dark, jagged rocky mountains on the horizon. The night sky is breathtaking, displaying a vivid green aurora borealis, bright stars, distant pinkish glowing clouds, and a luminous pink flying saucer hovering above. The mood is retrofuturistic, magical, nocturnal, and intimate.
Shot with a 35mm wide-angle lens at f/2.8, ISO 1600, using a slow sync flash technique at 1/15s shutter speed. The ethereal ambient light of the aurora beautifully exposes the night sky, while a soft frontal studio flash with a softbox perfectly illuminates the models. This challenging mixed lighting creates sharp, vivid specular highlights on the glossy surface of the latex, perfectly separating the models from the dark background. Masterpiece, high photographic resolution, pin-sharp focus on the models' eyes, incredibly realistic rendering of stretched latex and skin texture, perfect exposure balance. --ar 9:16
